title: helianthemum neopiliferum
intro: Helianthemum neopiliferum, also known as the creeping rockrose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cistaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Helianthemum neopiliferum are said to include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, which may help to prevent infections. The herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
